text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking down the hallway with
T.M. Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This skin of mine, so fine and soft, would have me
heralded as this generation's Cleopatra...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But alas! Such a hideous deformation has
appeared!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Your eyes fail you! Look here, at my index finger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On closer inspection, I do see a sore-looking spot
on the very tip of her finger, but it's barely
noticeable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Can you even comprehend it? No amount of grieving will resolve my woe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, a tiny rash proves a major problem to
Opera O. She couldn't be more devastated.
